name: toss-place-fe-superpowers
description: A frontend assignment workflow kit for Toss Place style take-home assignments. It helps with requirement analysis, stack selection, Next.js RSC architecture, Simple FSD, API design, component boundaries, parallel agent orchestration, review-fix loops, reliability review, and final polish.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend take-home workflows for Toss Place style reliability and architecture
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first skill pack for frontend take-home assignments, especially Toss Place and offline-commerce-like products. It guides requirement analysis, stack selection, Next.js RSC and caching architecture, Simple FSD structure, API layer design, re-render-aware component boundaries, Codex subagent orchestration, review-fix loops, reliability review, offline edge-case checks, and final submission polish.
defaultPrompt: Run a frontend assignment with parallel agents.
Review and fix this assignment until verification passes.
Polish this Toss Place style submission.
